scripts.setup:
# Copy configuration files
# cp "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/.env" .

cp "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/.env.local" .
cp "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/.env.development.local" .
cp "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/.claude/settings.local.json" ./.claude/
 
# Install dependencies
bun install
scripts.run:
# Run tests or a dev server, for example:
bun run dev
